mapper.insert: INSERT INTO nodes (user_id, name, os_type, status, agent_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{osType}, 'Y', #{agentId})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, name, os_type, status, last_seen, created_at, agent_id FROM nodes WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE nodes SET name = #{name} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE nodes SET last_seen = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status <> 'D'
UPDATE nodes SET status = 'Y', last_seen = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status <> 'D'
